entries.mnemonic: wide(宽广的)+spread(传播,分布)→分布广的

senses.example: There is a widespread belief that the company is in financial trouble.
senses.example_zh: 很多人认为该公司财务陷入困境。

senses.example: The child was infected with the AIDS virus.
senses.example_zh: 这个小孩感染了艾滋病病毒。

entries.mnemonic: ab(away)+solute(松开)→解开的→不受约束的

senses.example: There is no absolute standard for beauty.

senses.def_en: not limited by restrictions or exceptions
senses.def_zh: 不受任何限制的,无限的
senses.example: absolute freedom/power // He has absolute authority to look into the matter.
senses.example_zh: 无限的自由/权力 // 他完全有权调查此事。

derivatives: absolutely ad. 绝对地;完全地

senses.def_en: in a way that is not gentle or careful
senses.example: Alan dropped the cat roughly to the floor.
senses.example_zh: 阿伦粗暴地把猫摔到地上。

senses.def_en: not exactly but close in number, quality, meaning, etc.
senses.example: He roughly outlined the plot of the opera. // The company employs men and women in roughly equal proportions.
senses.example_zh: 他粗略地概述了歌剧的情节。// 公司聘用的男员工与女员工人数大致相等。

entries.mnemonic: ap(to)+proxim(最接近的)+ate→接近的→近似的

senses.def_en: almost correct or exact, close in value or amount but not precise
senses.example: What is the approximate size of this room?
Your story approximates to the real facts.
senses.example_zh: 你所说的仅仅是接近事实真相。

senses.def_en: to calculate the almost exact value or position of
senses.example: The cost of the project will approximate $10,000.
senses.example_zh: 这个项目的成本大约为 1 万美金。

senses.example: Their accidental meeting led to a renewal of their acquaintance.
senses.example_zh: 偶然的相遇使他们再续前缘。

entries.mnemonic: ac(to)+cur(注意)+ate→高度注意,确保“精确的”

senses.example: Are you sure that your clock is accurate?
senses.example_zh: 你确定你的钟走时准吗?

senses.example: Journalists are not always accurate in what they write.
senses.example_zh: 新闻工作者的报道并非总是准确的。

entries.mnemonic: o(away)+mit(送)→把琐碎的细节放走→省略

senses.def_en: to fail to include or mention; leave out
senses.example: omit an item from a list // Tell us everything that occurred. Don't omit any detail.
senses.example_zh: 从目录中略去一项 // 告诉我们所发生的一切,不要漏掉任何细节。

senses.example: Incidentally, your proposal will be open to the discussion at the meeting.
senses.example_zh: 顺便提一句,你的建议将在会议上进行讨论。

senses.def_en: coming or happening at a later time
senses.example: His foolish behavior led to his eventual failure.
senses.example_zh: 他的愚蠢行为导致了他最后的失败。

derivatives: eventuality n. 可能出现的结果

entries.mnemonic: pur(向前)+sue(跟随)→跟随前进→追赶

senses.def_en: to proceed along the course of
senses.example: She decided to pursue her studies after obtaining her bachelor's degree.
senses.example_zh: 她决定在获得学士学位之后继续深造。

extras.title: 表示“传染”的形容词
extras.content: infectious:指病菌通过空气、食物、水等物的间接传染。contagious:一般指跟病人直接接触而感染的病。
